最 zuì (before an adjective or verb) to the highest degree; (the) most ...; -est; (after 之[zhi1]) best or most extreme example (e.g. 世界之最[shi4 jie4 zhi1 zui4] "the greatest in the world") 最为 (zuì wèi); 最优 (zuì yōu); 最佳 (zuì jiā) Question & Function 135 1485
